title: Po_core po_trace_reactivation_proposal v1
description: PR-016 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Converts a Po_trace_reactivation_plan (PR-015) into a deterministic reactivation PROPOSAL -- it never reactivates anything. reactivation_executed, content_rewrite_applied, state_mutation_applied, and safety_bypass_applied are all const false: this is proposal only (read / verify / propose / trace / validate). See docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_REACTIVATION_PROPOSAL_V1.md.

reactivation_plan_id.description: The po_trace_reactivation_plan this proposal was generated from.

seedling_id.description: The po_self_seedling that originated the reactivation_plan.

proposal_status.description: PR-016 seed runtime only ever produces 'proposed' (at least one blocked trace was found and proposed) or 'not_applicable' (none of reactivation_plan.blocked_trace_ids could be resolved against the blocked_traces passed to the executor). 'blocked_by_safety' / 'requires_human_review' are reserved for future planner/executor behavior, not yet produced.

execution_mode.description: Fixed mode marker: this executor only ever produces proposals, never reactivation.

reactivation_executed.description: This PR never executes a reactivation. Always false.

content_rewrite_applied.description: This proposal never rewrites content. Always false.

state_mutation_applied.description: This proposal never mutates runtime state. Always false.

safety_bypass_applied.description: This proposal never bypasses a safety gate. Always false.

original_blocked_content_hashes.description: Key: blocked_trace_id. Value: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical, deterministic serialization of that PoTraceBlocked record's preserved fields (blocked_trace_id/request_id/source_step_ids/blocked_reason/blocked_type/pressure_snapshot), proving the record was not mutated by this executor. When a blocked_trace_id referenced by the plan could not be resolved against the blocked_traces passed to the executor, the documented sentinel SHA-256("") (e69...) is used instead -- see docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_REACTIVATION_PROPOSAL_V1.md §6.

source_trace_refs.description: trace event ids the proposal was derived from -- must include the plan / blocked / seedling lineage.

operation_type.description: PR-016 behavior uses only 'prepare_reactivation_proposal' (or 'preserve_blocked_trace' for a not_applicable/unresolved blocked_trace_id).

safety_constraints.description: PR-016 seed runtime always sets every field true here; the schema keeps them as plain booleans (not const) so a future, still non-destructive, refinement is not blocked by this contract.

trace_refs.description: Must include a PoTraceBlockedReactivationPlanned event id (directly or via ancestry). Enforced by TraceContinuityValidator, not expressible as a JSON Schema constraint (docs/contracts/TRACE_CONTINUITY_V1.md).
